scripts.web: pnpm run build:web && deno run -A web/server.ts
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm run dev:api" "pnpm run dev:web"
scripts.format: oxfmt --write src tests web/src web/*.html web/*.css vite.config.ts tsconfig.json
scripts.check-format: oxfmt --check src tests web/src web/*.html web/*.css vite.config.ts tsconfig.json
